last_added.title: A storm is spinning up in the Gulf of Mexico — forecasters give it an 80% chance of becoming a tropical cyclone within two days, aimed at Florida
Madhya Pradesh clears a Uniform Civil Code draft that makes registering a live-in relationship compulsory — skip it, and you could face jail
India and the EU say their long-delayed free-trade deal is nearly done — aiming to sign by year-end and switch it on in early 2027
A shallow earthquake in Peru's Andes kills at least five and flattens dozens of homes near Huancayo
